projects.name: AI Scribe for Physician-Patient Consultations
projects.summary: Built AI-powered medical scribe system to automatically summarize physician-patient consultations, reducing doctors' administrative time. Developed machine learning models for patient data processing using Java and Python/JavaScript libraries.

projects.name: Historical Decolonization Website
projects.summary: Created an educational website explaining the historical process of decolonization using HTML and Java. Demonstrates ability to build informational web content on historical topics.

projects.name: NFL Draft Team Simulator Game
projects.summary: Interactive game allowing users to simulate their favorite NFL team's 2021 draft decisions and visualize alternative team compositions. Combines sports analytics interest with web development.

projects.name: Teacher Selection Filtering Tool
projects.summary: Developed a filtering tool enabling students to search and select teachers best suited to their needs across campus. Part of Software and Computer Engineering Society coding projects.
